---
title: "Ntando Sithole"
subtitle: "Actuarial Specialist | Cell Captives, Valuations and Capital Modelling"
image: assets/profile-avatar-male.png
image-alt: "Male illustrated profile avatar of Ntando Sithole"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/profile-avatar-male.png
  image-alt: "Male illustrated profile avatar of Ntando Sithole"
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 18em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ntandwenhle-sithole-b06896169/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ntandwenhle.sithole@gmail.com
---

## Professional Profile

I am an Actuarial Specialist working across cell captive arrangements,
corporate actuarial valuations, and capital modelling. My valuation experience
includes reporting under IFRS 17 and the Solvency Assessment and Management
(SAM) framework.

I use R to support actuarial analysis, model development, and the clear
communication of results. This portfolio presents selected technical work and
practical perspectives for fellow actuarial and insurance professionals.

## Areas of Practice

- Cell captive arrangements
- Corporate actuarial valuations under IFRS 17 and SAM
- Capital modelling and solvency analysis
- Actuarial analysis and model development in R
